name: BorderItem
description: Position content in a named BorderLayout region with optional alignment, spacing, and sticky behavior.

position.description: Defines the BorderLayout region for this item.

sticky.description: Pins the item while surrounding regions scroll beneath it.

horizontalAlignment.description: Aligns the item on the inline axis within its region.

verticalAlignment.description: Aligns the item on the block axis within its region.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the item using responsive values.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing inside the item using responsive values.

slots.children: Content rendered in the selected BorderLayout region.
